title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Speciality Restaurants Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Speciality Restaurants Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Speciality Restaurants Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Speciality Restaurants Global Group:
Speciality Restaurants Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Speciality Restaurants Global Group!
